fields.name: Part of Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies the part of the field to use to generate the search string. There are two options: First and Last.

fields.name: Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many characters the search string will contain. You can enter a number from 2 to 10. The program automatically enters 5 as a default value.

fields.name: Field Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field to use to generate the search string.
